title: Pickle Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Fake Pickle Jar exploiting swap function without whitelisting

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls swapExactJarForJar() without whitelisting the target jar
prevention.trigger: swapExactJarForJar() called without whitelisted target jar

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls swapExactJarForJar() without whitelisted target jar
summary: Pickle Finance was hacked due to a lack of whitelisting for the swap function, allowing attackers to create fake jars and drain funds. A guard could have prevented this by blocking unauthorized swaps.
